{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Foxtail Enforcer
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Foxtail]] [[Enforcer technique]] distorts the user's appearance to throw off an opponent's aim.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
